Additional context from the user's mention:
<issue identifier="REN-1064">
<title>afclient: extract public API client package (internal/api → afclient/)</title>
<description>
## Summary

Promote the API client from `internal/api/` to a public `afclient/` package so downstream consumers (notably the closed-source `rensei-tui`) can import `DataSource`, `Client`, `MockClient`, request/response types, and sentinel errors as a Go library dependency.

This is the API-contract seam described in [CLAUDE.md](<http://CLAUDE.md>) (Package Architecture → Public Packages): `afclient/` is the single source of truth for types and the `DataSource` interface that `afcli/` command factories depend on.

## Scope

Atomic refactor. One package move, no behavior change. No new endpoints introduced — existing coordinator surface is mirrored 1:1.

Files owned by `afclient/`:

* `client.go` — `DataSource` interface, `Client` struct, `NewClient`, `NewAuthenticatedClient`, method set covering public + MCP + CLI endpoints
* `mock.go` — `MockClient` implementing `DataSource` for TUI/CLI `--mock` modes and tests
* `types.go` — all request/response structs (`StatsResponse`, `SessionsListResponse`, `SessionDetailResponse`, `ActivityListResponse`, `ChatSession*`, `ReconnectSession*`, `SubmitTask*`, `StopAgent*`, `ForwardPrompt*`, `CostReport*`, `ListFleet*`, `WhoAmI*`)
* `errors.go` — sentinel errors for expected failures (per [CLAUDE.md](<http://CLAUDE.md>) Conventions → Errors)
* `*_test.go` — stdlib `testing` + table-driven, `httptest` for HTTP mocks (per [CLAUDE.md](<http://CLAUDE.md>) Conventions → Testing)

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `afclient/` exists at repo root and is importable as `github.com/RenseiAI/agentfactory-tui/afclient`
- [ ] `internal/api/` removed; no remaining references from `afcli/`, `cmd/af/`, `worker/`, or `internal/`
- [ ] Exported surface: `DataSource` interface, `Client`, `MockClient`, `NewClient`, `NewAuthenticatedClient`, `NewMockClient`, all `*Request`/`*Response` types, sentinel errors
- [ ] Only `RegisterCommands`, `RunDashboard`, `Config` exported from `afcli/` (`Config.ClientFactory` returns `afclient.DataSource`) — per [CLAUDE.md](<http://CLAUDE.md>) Public Packages
- [ ] Errors follow `fmt.Errorf("context: %w", err)` with sentinels in `afclient/errors.go`
- [ ] Tests pass with race detector and coverage meets project targets (80% target / 70% minimum)
- [ ] `make lint` clean (govet, staticcheck, gofumpt, errcheck, gosec, gocritic, revive)
- [ ] `make vuln` clean

## Verification

```bash
make test       # go test -race ./...
make lint       # golangci-lint run
make coverage   # confirm ≥70% on afclient/
make build      # af binary still links
make run-mock   # dashboard via MockClient still renders
```

## Implementation Status

Already implemented on branch. Public surface present in `afclient/` with passing tests (`client_test.go`, `mock_test.go`, `types_test.go`). Issue remains in Icebox for human review before moving to Backlog.

## References

* [CLAUDE.md](<http://CLAUDE.md>) → Package Architecture, Public Packages, Conventions
* API surface: [CLAUDE.md](<http://CLAUDE.md>) → API Endpoints (public + MCP + CLI auth)
* Follow-on consumer wiring: see sibling issues in agentfactory-tui project (afcli/ command factories, worker/ protocol)
</description>
<team name="Rensei"/>
<project name="agentfactory-tui">OSS AgentFactory CLI/TUI — library + binary. Public packages: afclient/, afcli/, worker/. All generic AF commands live here.</project>
</issue>
